criteriaResults.evidence: Explicit case 'refusal' -> 'refusal' in anthropic.ts normalizeStopReason before default branch; 'refusal' documented in StopReason doc comment in types.ts; new test in anthropic.test.ts (20/20 green).

openai.ts: case 'content_filter' -> 'refusal' in normalizeStopReason + message.refusal override branch in chat() (OAIMessage gains refusal?: string|null). openai-compat inherits via super.chat. 3 new tests (27/27 green).
agentic-loop.ts completion branch derives refused = turnStopReason === 'refusal', spread-conditionally sets refused:true; never throws. Tests: same-turn refusal + refusal after prior tool_use turn.

generator-agent.ts: parseGeneratorResult exported; refusal fail-closed guard is FIRST statement, returns success:false with 'model refused: <excerpt>' note before filesWritten shortcut. 2 tests with non-empty filesWritten.

refused emitted via ...(refused ? {refused:true} : {}) — Object.hasOwn(result,'refused')===false on normal 'end' and max-turns paths (regression tests). Full suite 3699/3699 green (3686 baseline + 13 new).
npm run build exit 0; npm run typecheck exit 0; npm run lint 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings in unrelated eval-persist.test.ts).

filesChanged.description: Documented 'refusal' as known StopReason value (doc comment only; union already open).
refusal?: string|null on OAIMessage; case 'content_filter' -> 'refusal'; message.refusal override branch in chat().
3 tests: content_filter mapping, message.refusal override, absent/empty refusal regression.
Optional refused?: boolean on AgenticLoopResult; spread-conditional refused:true on completion branch only.
Scripted-LLMClient refusal tests + byte-identical-absence regressions (normal + max-turns).
Exported parseGeneratorResult; refused?: boolean param widening; fail-closed refusal guard first.
Direct parseGeneratorResult unit tests: refusal overrides filesWritten/success report; byte-identical when refused absent/false.

commits: 35a2dbd - bober(sprint-1): refusal detection end-to-end (stopReason 'refusal' + fail-closed generator)
notes: Grep-confirmed no production consumer outside providers/ + agentic-loop.ts reads AgenticLoopResult.stopReason/refused. openai-compat.ts and claude-code.ts untouched. No ChatResponse.refused field (loop derives it). No new deps. Full suite 3699/3699; suite baseline was 3686.
